title: Quarterra Announces the Opening of Emblem Riverside Apartments
text: Garden-style community brings 320 new homes to Douglasville, Ga. ATLANTA , Jan. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quarterra , a subsidiary of Lennar Corporation and a vertically integrated multifamily apartment builder, developer, and asset manager, today announced the opening of its newest community, Emblem Riverside , in the Atlanta suburb of Douglasville.

title: Homebuilder Fund In Buy Zone As Mortgage Rates Drop
text: The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF started the new year strong, up over 9%, outpacing the S&P 500. The post Homebuilder Fund In Buy Zone As Mortgage Rates Drop appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Housing Market 2023: How To Navigate Between Industry Optimism And Macro-Economic Headwinds
text: Despite recessionary market conditions, earnings reports from the industry are full of optimism. Stocks priced in recession at last year's lows and are now discounting a lot of today's optimism as shown in reports from Lennar, KB Home, LGI Homes, and Redfin.

title: Top 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For January 2023
text: This article will focus on DGI stocks that are likely to provide a high rate of dividend growth rather than a high current yield. High-growth dividend stocks are particularly suited for folks who are in the accumulation phase and are several years away from retirement.

title: Lennar (LEN) Up 5.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?

title: Battered homebuilder stocks may be primed for a new rally as US mortgage rates look set to drop in 2023, Bank of America says
text: BofA is anticipating a drop in the 30-year mortgage rate to about 5.25% this year - a move favorable to homebuilding stocks.

title: Mortgage rates should keep falling, boosting home-builder stocks, analysts say
text: Shares of home builders enjoyed a broad rally Wednesday after BofA Securities said it sees a “favorable setup” for the sector, with lower mortgage rates on the horizon.

title: Not the Cool Kids
text: As we start the year 2023, we are reminded of the profound poetry from the band, Echosmith, in the song, “Cool Kids.” It can teach us about what it takes to succeed in long-duration common stock investing currently.

title: 5 Relatively Safe And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - January 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five companies that are large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying, and are offering large discounts to their historical norms. It's always a good idea to keep your wish list ready by separating the wheat from the chaff.
